summary: Successfully debugged and resolved the NixOS system build failures. Identified that sops-install-secrets was failing due to a stale nix-secrets flake lock missing the paperless_password key. Updated the flake input, verified a completely clean system build via nh os build ., and committed the lockfile changes. The system is now fully prepared for activation.
goals: Finalize nix-presets flake input transition for pure-mode evaluation (Completed)
Debug and resolve CrowdSec container build failure (Completed)
Update nix-secrets flake lock to resolve missing paperless_password secret (Completed)
Validate system configuration build health via nh os build (Completed)
User execution of nh os switch . to apply the new system configuration (Pending User Action)
blockers: The AI agent runs with NoNewPrivileges=true, preventing direct execution of sudo commands like nh os switch or nh os test (activation phase).
